ValidationRule.description: Requires a structured decision reason whenever a stewardship case is moved into a final decision state.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISPICKVAL(Decision_Status__c, "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(Decision_Status__c, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(Decision_Status__c, "Deferred"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Deferred") ) && ISBLANK(TEXT(Decision_Reason_Code__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Select a decision reason code before saving an approved, rejected, or deferred governance case.
